allow: Bash(wsl -e bash -ic "for slug in openai anthropic google mistral meta intercom elevenlabs gorgias cursor vercel; do echo -n ""$slug: ""; curl -s -o /dev/null -w ''%{http_code}'' http://localhost:4321/tools/pricing-calculator/$slug; echo; done")

Bash(wsl -e bash -c 'curl -s -o /dev/null -w ""%{http_code}"" http://localhost:4321/tools/pricing-calculator/anthropic && echo "" anthropic"" && curl -s -o /dev/null -w ""%{http_code}"" http://localhost:4321/tools/pricing-calculator/google && echo "" google"" && curl -s -o /dev/null -w ""%{http_code}"" http://localhost:4321/tools/pricing-calculator/elevenlabs && echo "" elevenlabs"" && curl -s -o /dev/null -w ""%{http_code}"" http://localhost:4321/tools/pricing-calculator/gorgias && echo "" gorgias"" && curl -s -o /dev/null -w ""%{http_code}"" http://localhost:4321/tools/pricing-calculator/cursor && echo "" cursor"" && curl -s -o /dev/null -w ""%{http_code}"" http://localhost:4321/tools/pricing-calculator/vercel && echo "" vercel"" && curl -s -o /dev/null -w ""%{http_code}"" http://localhost:4321/tools/pricing-calculator/mistral && echo "" mistral"" && curl -s -o /dev/null -w ""%{http_code}"" http://localhost:4321/tools/pricing-calculator/meta && echo "" meta""')
